    Index

    L M P S 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    L

    list() - Method in class Stack
    Lists all elements from bottom to top separated by semicolons.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class StackTest
    Entry point that executes all stack test scenarios.

    P

    peek() - Method in class Stack
    Returns the top element without removing it from the stack.
    pop() - Method in class Stack
    Removes and returns the top element from the stack.
    push(T) - Method in class Stack
    Pushes an element on top of the stack.

    S

    size() - Method in class Stack
    Returns the number of currently stored elements.
    Stack<T> - Class in Unnamed Package
    Generic stack implementation based on an array.
    Stack() - Constructor for class Stack
    Creates an empty stack with a default capacity.
    Stack(int, int, Object[]) - Constructor for class Stack
    Creates a stack with all attribute values provided from outside.
    StackEmptyException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
    Exception that is thrown when an element is read from an empty stack.
    StackEmptyException(String) - Constructor for exception class StackEmptyException
    Creates the exception with a custom message.
    StackFullException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
    Exception that is thrown when an element is pushed to a full stack.
    StackFullException(String) - Constructor for exception class StackFullException
    Creates the exception with a custom message.
    StackTest - Class in Unnamed Package
    Runnable test class for the generic stack implementation.
    StackTest() - Constructor for class StackTest
    Creates a new test runner.
